[textmode.js](../../../index.md) / [Textmodifier](../../Textmodifier.md) / lerp

# Method: lerp()

```ts
lerp(
   start, 
   stop, 
   amount): number;
```

Linear interpolation between two values.

## Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
| ------ | ------ | ------ |
| `start` | `number` | First value. |
| `stop` | `number` | Second value. |
| `amount` | `number` | Interpolation amount, where 0 returns `start` and 1 returns `stop`. |

## Returns

`number`

The interpolated value.
